hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) cd /home/user/rxdb && (npm run lint > /tmp/claude-lint.log 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"lint: ok"}') || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"lint failed (see /tmp/claude-lint.log)\"}" ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /home/user/rxdb && (npm run check-types > /tmp/claude-check-types.log 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"check-types: ok"}') || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"check-types failed (see /tmp/claude-check-types.log)\"}" ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *src/*.ts|*src/*.tsx) cd /home/user/rxdb && (npm run build > /tmp/claude-build.log 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"build: ok"}') || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"build failed (see /tmp/claude-build.log)\"}" ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js) cd /home/user/rxdb && (npm run test:fast:memory > /tmp/claude-test.log 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"test:fast:memory: ok"}') || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"test:fast:memory failed (see /tmp/claude-test.log)\"}" ;; esac
